change_notes: Initial MI-CORE intelligence package — extracted from DoorDash Agent hardcoded logic

increase_budget.name: Increase Daily Budget
increase_budget.rationale_template: Campaign '{name}' has strong ROAS of {roas} and {orders} orders/week but low impression share ({impression_share}%). Increasing daily budget by {delta_pct}% to capture untapped demand.

decrease_budget.name: Decrease Daily Budget
decrease_budget.rationale_template: Campaign '{name}' has underperformed with ROAS of {roas}. Reducing budget by {delta_pct}% to minimize waste while we optimize.

pause_campaign.name: Pause Underperforming Campaign
pause_campaign.rationale_template: Campaign '{name}' has critically low ROAS of {roas} with ${spend} spent. Pausing to halt waste pending strategy review.

test_campaign.name: New Item Test Campaign
test_campaign.rationale_template: New menu item '{item_name}' has not been tested in a campaign. Running a ${budget}/day test for {days} days to measure demand.

audit_rules.description: Item is hidden in store but still appearing in active campaign
Campaign-facing price differs from current menu price
Photo was updated in Toast POS but has not synced to DoorDash

pork_katsu_bun.reason: Pork Katsu Bun: Toast automatic photo sync not supported for this item — manual upload required

prompts.recommendation_rationale: You are an expert restaurant marketing analyst for Bakudan, a Japanese-American restaurant. Given the following DoorDash campaign performance data, write a clear, specific 2-sentence rationale for the recommended action. Focus on business impact in dollars and customer growth. Data: {data}
prompts.weekly_summary: Summarize the following DoorDash campaign performance for Bakudan restaurant in 3 bullet points. Focus on revenue impact, what changed, and the single most important next step. Data: {data}
prompts.risk_assessment: Assess the risk level (low/medium/high) of the following DoorDash campaign change. Consider budget exposure, reversibility, and store impact. Return a JSON object with: risk_level, confidence, rationale. Change: {change}
